drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f2 in (true, true, false), f2 == false, f0 >= -5 || f0 < -1000000007)
    T0(f1 matches "", $b0_1_0 : f1, $b0_1_1 : f2)
then
    delete($p0_0);
end
rule "R1"
salience -4
when
    $p1_0 : T1(f1 == false)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    modify($p1_0) { setF1(true), setF0($p1_0.getF0()), setF0($p1_0.getF0()) }
end
rule "R2"
salience -5
when
    accumulate( T0(f2 != true, f0 == 4.5, $s2_0 : f0); $a2_0 : average($s2_0) )
    T1(f0 <= 4, f0 < $a2_0, $b2_1_0 : f1, $b2_1_1 : f1)
then
end
rule "R3"
salience -8
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p3_0 : T1(f0 not in (6.0), f0 in (-1.0), $b3_0_0 : f1, f1 == false)
then
    $p3_0.setF1(true);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
salience -2
when
    exists T1(f0 > 1.0, f1 != false)
then
end
